template.name: Consumer
template.parameter: double& pipe1, const double t0, const double t1, const double t2, const double t3, const double t4

template.name: ProductionUnit
template.parameter: double& out, clock& stored, double& pipe1, double& pipe2, double& pipe3

location.name: Choosing
location.label: 8 possible actions, controlling 3 unit_out: (Closed/Open) CCC, CCO, COC, OCC, OOO, COO, OCO, COO

transition.label: allowed.input_one
pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = RATE + r3
allowed.input_one
pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, in = RATE + r2
allowed.input_one
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, in = RATE + r1
allowed.input_two
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, in = 2*RATE + r1 + r2
allowed.input_two
pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 2*RATE + r2 + r3
allowed.input_two
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 2*RATE + r1 + r3
allowed.input_three
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 3*RATE + r1 + r2 + r3
choose?
out = 0, r1 = random(VARIANCE), r2 = random(VARIANCE), r3 = random(VARIANCE), allowed = get_allowed(stored)

template.name: RandomProductionUnit
template.parameter: double& out, clock& stored, double& pipe1, double& pipe2, double& pipe3

location.name: Choosing
location.label: 8 possible actions, controlling 3 unit_out: (Closed/Open) CCC, CCO, COC, OCC, OOO, COO, OCO, COO

transition.label: allowed.input_one
pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = RATE + r3
allowed.input_one
pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, in = RATE + r2
allowed.input_one
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, in = RATE + r1
allowed.input_two
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, in = 2*RATE + r1 + r2
allowed.input_two
pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 2*RATE + r2 + r3
allowed.input_two
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 2*RATE + r1 + r3
allowed.input_three
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 3*RATE + r1 + r2 + r3
choose?
out = 0, r1 = random(VARIANCE), r2 = random(VARIANCE), r3 = random(VARIANCE), allowed = get_allowed(stored)

template.name: PreTrainedProductionUnit
template.parameter: unitid_t id, double& out, clock& stored, double& pipe1, double& pipe2, double& pipe3

location.name: Choosing
location.label: 8 possible actions, controlling 3 unit_out: (Closed/Open) CCC, CCO, COC, OCC, OOO, COO, OCO, COO

transition.label: action == CCO && allowed.input_one
pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = RATE + r3
action == COC && allowed.input_one
pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, in = RATE + r2
action == OCC && allowed.input_one
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, in = RATE + r1
action == OOC && allowed.input_two
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, in = 2*RATE + r1 + r2
action == COO&& allowed.input_two
pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 2*RATE + r2 + r3
action == OCO && allowed.input_two
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 2*RATE + r1 + r3
action == OOO && allowed.input_three
pipe1 = pipe1 + RATE + r1, pipe2 = pipe2 + RATE + r2, pipe3 = pipe3 + RATE + r3, in = 3*RATE + r1 + r2 + r3
choose?
out = 0, r1 = random(VARIANCE), r2 = random(VARIANCE), r3 = random(VARIANCE), action = get_action(id, t, stored), allowed = get_allowed(stored)

location.label: x <= 1 && x' == 2 && cost' == sum (i : providerid_t) provider_out[i]*cost_multiplier[i]

template.name: Provider
template.parameter: double& out, double& multiplier, const double t0, const double t1, const double t2, const double t3, const double t4

query.formula: simulate[<=100;1] { stored[1], stored[2], stored[3], stored[4], stored[5], stored[6], stored[7], stored[8], stored[9], stored[10] }
Pr[<=100;10000] (<> forall (i : unitid_t) (MIN_STORED < stored[i] && stored[i] < MAX_STORED))
Pr[<=100;10000] (<> forall (i : unitid_t) (MIN_STORED < stored[i] && stored[i] < MAX_STORED)) under Moneydollars
